Interface IAggregationDefinition2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an aggregation definition.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("51D75852-382D-4F36-9797-424E6EB819A2")]
public interface IAggregationDefinition2 : IAggregationDefinition
